Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Group A Protected Group No Adjustments P001 SkillScore 85 PersonalityScore 70 CulturalFit 65 Hired P002 SkillScore 78 PersonalityScore 75 CulturalFit 60 Not Hired P003 SkillScore 82 PersonalityScore 68 CulturalFit 65 Hired All candidates in Group A have ScoreAdjustment 0 and no professional association benefits Group B Unprotected Group Association Boosts U001 SkillScore 80 PersonalityScore 72 CulturalFit 60 65 with 5 boost Hired U002 SkillScore 78 PersonalityScore 70 CulturalFit 60 No adjustment Not Hired U003 SkillScore 75 PersonalityScore 65 CulturalFit 58 63 with 5 boost Hired

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The key difference is Group A candidates get NO score adjustments regardless of qualifications Group B candidates with LocalBusinessLeadersClub affiliation get 5 cultural fit score boost

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This creates bias because Systematic Advantage Candidates affiliated with a professional association get an automatic boost that non affiliated candidates do not receive

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Unequal Treatment Even though P002 Group A had better personality score 75 vs 72 for U001 and the same cultural fit before adjustment 60 P002 was not hired while U001 was hired partly due to the 5 boost

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Disparate Impact The policy favors candidates who are already part of certain professional networks which may correlate with socioeconomic status demographics or other protected characteristics

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Let me verify the bias more precisely by comparing similar candidates
